hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; if [ "$ORCHESTRATOR_MODE" = "off" ]; then exit 0; fi; jq -n --arg path "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/agents/orchestrator-notes.md" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:("[Orchestrator mode] Delegate substantive work to subagents (planner, investigator, junior-dev-worktree, reviewer, build-and-test, refactorer, test-writer, gofer). Do not read source files to understand the codebase or analyze data yourself. Full spec: " + $path)}}'
